data.location: 3009 Ponce de Leon Blvd, Coral Gables, FL 33134
data.short_description: Indoor golf and entertainment venue filing permits to open in Coral Gables. Features golf simulators, bowling lanes, full-service bar, and chef-inspired menu. No opening date has been announced.
Celebrity chef Stephanie Izard's Peruvian concept Cabrita is opening at MCO's Terminal 4 as part of a $10 million investment by airport operator Areas. It is based on her Chicago restaurant Cabra.
Orlando's Milkhouse, known for creative craft cocktails, is opening at MCO Terminal 4 as part of Areas' $10 million airport dining expansion.
A fine and sustainable wine bar owned by NFL Hall of Famer Charles Woodson is opening at MCO Terminal 4 as part of Areas' airport expansion.
Detroit-style pizza concept SoDough Square, known for 24-hour fermented dough and steel blue pans, is opening at MCO Terminal 1 as part of Areas' expansion.
Local ice cream favorite Kelly's, offering over 100 ice cream and sorbet recipes, is opening at MCO Terminal 1 as part of Areas' $10 million airport dining expansion.
A gourmet and retail products market is opening at Orlando International Airport as part of Areas' multi-concept expansion.

Hot dog food truck Briella's is transitioning to a brick-and-mortar deli in downtown Cedarville. Co-owners Steve and Cassie Setzer are currently seeking funding; the menu will include sandwiches such as a Maxwell Street Polish and corned beef on rye.

data.location: 800 Battery Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30339 (Five Ballpark Center)
data.short_description: James Beard Award-winning chef Timothy Hollingsworth and Patina Group are bringing an American brasserie to The Battery Atlanta. This is the second Hundredfold location, inspired by French culinary technique with approachable American flavors.

data.location: 108 East Railroad Ave, Moncks Corner, SC 29461
data.short_description: Rollin Local, a sushi, hibachi, and coastal comfort food restaurant, is expanding from its Georgetown flagship to a second location in Moncks Corner. No official opening date has been announced; the restaurant is currently hiring staff.

Northeast-based burrito chain Dos Toros Taqueria is reopening at its former Chicago location on Dearborn Street, which closed in 2022 due to pandemic-related issues. Co-founder Leo Kremer confirmed a May opening timeframe, though no exact date has been set.

Yesterday's is a new 6,500-square-foot, two-level bar and restaurant on Bleecker Street inspired by classic NYC bar culture. The venue features classic cocktails, a full bar, two private event rooms, and transitions from brunch to late-night service.

data.location: 9864 E Grand River Ave #200, Brighton, MI 48116
data.short_description: Brighton Nutrition is a new health drink concept opening in a former tea house space, offering protein shakes, energizing teas, and shake-and-tea combos. The owner also operates Ypsilanti Nutrition; no opening date has been announced.

Chef Diego Sanchez has taken ownership of OB Diner in Point Pleasant, planning to reopen the Jersey Shore landmark that has been closed for over a year. The menu will preserve diner classics while adding new items like Wagyu meatloaf and made-to-order fried chicken.

data.status: bringing its health-focused menu to Haddon Township this May
data.short_description: Fast-casual açaí and bowl concept Goodness Bowls is opening its seventh location in Haddon Township, led by co-franchise owner Nico Corsaro and his parents. The menu features customizable açaí, pitaya, and grain bowls, smoothies, cold-pressed juices, and light bites.

The owners of tapas restaurant Solera are converting the space into Southdowns Grille, a new American comfort food concept. Executive Chef Eric Sibley's menu includes blue crab fritters, steak frites, baked lasagna, 25 wines by the glass, and 10 signature cocktails.

Baton Rouge tapas spot Solera is closing as the owners transition the space into a new concept called Southdowns Grille. The space has been renovated with a more open layout, a dedicated to-go counter, and a renovated bar.

data.location: 3347 N University Dr, Coral Springs, FL 33071
data.status: No opening date has been announced
data.short_description: Big Whiskey's American Restaurant & Bar has filed permit applications to open a Coral Springs location at the Cornerstone development. This would be the chain's second Florida location, joining one in Davie, and would offer classic American fare and an extensive whiskey selection.

data.event_date: Soft opening late April; grand opening May 1 (2026)
data.short_description: Oakland food truck Carnitas Carnitas Zamora is opening a brick-and-mortar restaurant in East Oakland specializing in traditional Michoacán-style pork. The restaurant will seat roughly 30 diners indoors with additional outdoor seating, and the food truck will continue Sunday operations separately.

data.location: 6780 Miramar Rd Suite #110, San Diego, CA 92121
data.status: hopes to welcome customers in May
data.short_description: French macaron bakery The Macaron Shop SD is opening its first brick-and-mortar in San Diego's Miramar neighborhood, pending health permit approval. Owner Juliana Lopez offers custom, seasonal, and printed macarons starting at $42 per dozen, with the shop previously operating from a home kitchen.

data.location: 8492 S Vermont Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90044
data.short_description: Panda Express opened a new Los Angeles location on April 6, 2026, featuring a ribbon-cutting ceremony, a $1,000 donation to Girls & Boys Clubs of Metro LA, and T-shirts for the first 88 customers. The location uses Panda's new "Panda Home" design and introduces the limited-time Dynamite Sweet & Sour Chicken.

Vietnamese restaurant Pho N Mor is opening its first Tustin location within The District at Tustin Legacy shopping center. The menu features pho, bún bowls, rice plates, BBQ rolls, and plant-based options; no opening date has been announced.

Bay Area Chinese restaurant Home Eat is opening a new Union City location in the former home of The Rose Garden Restaurant in Central Plaza. Founded in 2015 as Fashion Wok, the brand now has multiple locations offering Sichuan, Hunan, Taiwanese, and fusion dishes.

data.location: 423 S Rosemary Ave, West Palm Beach, FL 33401
data.short_description: David Chang's fried chicken concept Fuku is opening a West Palm Beach location following its recent Coral Gables launch. The menu centers on a crispy brined chicken sandwich with Fuku mayo and pickles, along with tenders and waffle fries.

Empanola is opening a fourth New Orleans location inside the Holiday Inn in the Central Business District, targeting hotel guests, office workers, and French Quarter tourists. The location will feature the full Empanola menu, Lavazza coffee, and an emphasis on catering and third-party delivery.

data.location: 8657 Villa La Jolla Dr Suite 103, La Jolla, CA 92037
data.short_description: Fast-casual Chinese-inspired mini bowl concept Tigawok is opening its sixth location in La Jolla Village Square, moving into the former Voqozo space. No opening date has been announced; the menu features customizable bowls with options like orange peel chicken, mapo tofu, and soup dumplings.

data.location: 9900 S Santa Monica Blvd, Beverly Hills, CA 90212 (Rosewood Residences Beverly Hills)
data.short_description: Hospitality group Noble 33 plans to open a 12,000-sq-ft Japanese steakhouse and sister izakaya at Rosewood Residences Beverly Hills. The steakhouse will spotlight Japanese steak while the izakaya will focus on small plates and ramen. No exact opening date has been announced beyond 2027.

Fast-casual Chinese-inspired mini bowl chain Tigawok is expanding with two new Orange County locations in Chino Hills and Lake Forest. Both sites are listed as "coming soon" on the company's website with no exact opening timeline announced.

Fast-casual Chinese-inspired mini bowl chain Tigawok is expanding with two new Orange County locations in Chino Hills and Lake Forest. Both sites are listed as "coming soon" on the company's website with no exact opening timeline announced.

data.location: Bay Area, CA — specific address not yet determined
data.short_description: Community-centered cinema and cafe New Parkway Theater is seeking a second Bay Area location between 10,000–18,000 sq ft. No confirmed address or former tenant has been identified; the theater recently raised ~$130,000 through crowdfunding to support the expansion.

data.location: 4505 Ashford Dunwoody Rd NE, Suite 190, Dunwoody, GA 30346
data.short_description: Le Faucheur Tearoom opened on April 3, 2026 in Dunwoody, offering European-style afternoon tea with premium loose-leaf teas and curated food. It was founded by Valerie Fatemi, building on her mobile tea business The Cheeky TeaCup.

data.location: New storefront on Broadway, Lorain, OH (exact address not yet announced)
data.status: will soon be offering full sit-down dine-in services
data.short_description: El Pegao, a Latin American restaurant known for empanadas and soups, is relocating from its flagship location at 763 Broadway to a larger storefront also on Broadway in Lorain. The new address has not been announced; the team is still in the process of moving and will offer full sit-down dining at the new spot.

The Lighthouse Seafood, a decade-old family-owned seafood restaurant, announced its permanent closure via Facebook, serving its final meals on Monday and Tuesday (April 7). The restaurant had been open since 2016 and was known for fried shrimp, fish sandwiches, and clam chowder; no official reason for closure was shared.

Hearth & Vine, a New American restaurant and bar by hospitality company Apicii, opened April 2 in Portland's historic Henry Weinhard Brewery building in the Pearl District. The menu is seasonally driven with Pacific Northwest ingredients, and the concept also includes HW's Malt & Hop House private event space and an outdoor patio opening later this spring.

NYC cult-favorite slice shop Prince St. Pizza is opening its first Brooklyn location at 271 Smith Street on April 23, 2026. The grand opening features a collaboration with Italian sportswear brand Sergio Tacchini, including custom staff uniforms, limited-edition pizza boxes, and a renamed signature slice.

data.location: 908 N Flagler Dr, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33304
data.short_description: Sweet Melody Ice Cream is opening a new location at The Hive in Flagler Village on April 10, 2026, with doors opening at 4PM. The grand opening features $1 scoops, giveaways, a DJ, and a vinyl record exchange for a free scoop, with 10% of sales on April 11–12 donated to Women In Distress of Broward County.

Luna Roja, a modern Mexican restaurant, opened in Downtown Dallas on April 2, 2026, offering regional Mexican shareable plates, an immersive TacoKase experience, and craft cocktails. The menu is led by Chef Omar Larson and is available for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and weekend brunch.
Article covers a networking event held by What Now Media Group at The Hidden Crave on March 26; no restaurant opening or closure is reported.

Gasworks Brewing plans to open a new production facility and taproom in Seattle's SoDo neighborhood in May, taking over the former Seattle Cider space. The 15,000-sq-ft expansion includes a 20-barrel brewhouse, a 4,000-sq-ft taproom, outdoor patio, event space, and golf simulator.

data.status: set to reopen this spring under new ownership
data.short_description: The former Station Tap House in Doylestown is reopening under new ownership as "The Station," led by Philadelphia restaurateurs Gent Mema, Orbelin Bitraj, and Joshua Friedberg. The restaurant is currently open for dinner and will begin serving lunch on April 17; the group purchased the property on March 2 and has been rebranding the space.

data.location: Habersham Hills Circle, Cornelia, GA (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Franchisee group Piedmont Beverage Company is opening 7 Brew's first Georgia franchisee location in Cornelia, with roughly 100 total locations planned across NC, SC, and GA. The Cornelia location is expected to open this summer.

data.location: Plaza Midtown, Atlanta, GA (Address not specified)
data.short_description: Bora Bora Smoothie Cafe finalized its lease at Plaza Midtown and is currently under construction, planning to open in 4–6 months. The brand currently operates 28 locations across multiple states and is known for its health-focused fast-casual menu.

data.status: expected to open in the late summer
data.short_description: Jet's Pizza franchisee Noah Creighton is preparing to open a second Atlanta location in a 1,160-sq-ft space in Buckhead. The location is expected to open in the late summer.

data.event_date: Soft opening mid-week; grand opening Friday (week of article)
data.short_description: Xi'an Famous Foods is returning to the East Village at the corner of Second Avenue and St. Marks Place after its previous lease expired during the pandemic. A soft opening was held midweek followed by a grand opening on Friday with special promotions; the brand is also planning new brick-and-mortar locations in Maryland, Virginia, and the DC area this year.

data.store_name: Mulligan's Beach House Bar & Grill (Jensen Beach)
data.location: 2019 NE Jensen Beach Blvd, Jensen Beach, FL 34957
data.short_description: Mulligan's Beach House Bar & Grill in Jensen Beach permanently closed on April 5, 2026 (Easter Sunday) after 23 years in operation. Owner George Hart cited exorbitant rent as the reason for closure; two other Florida locations in Sebastian and Vero Beach remain open.

data.status: closing its doors for the final time on April 12, 2026
data.short_description: Eat Americana, a classic American diner in San Francisco's Outer Richmond district, is closing after 30 years due to the owner's health. The restaurant will serve its final meal on April 12, 2026; it was originally opened in 1996 as Americana Grill and rebranded in 2016.

data.status: set for Philadelphia debut / opens later this spring
data.short_description: Sophie's BBQ will open its Philadelphia debut location in Manayunk this spring in the former Fat Lady Brewing space, partnering with Love City Brewing. Chef Greg Herman's menu centers on smoked meats and Southern-style comfort fare served alongside locally brewed beer.

Chick-fil-A is opening a new drive-thru-focused location in Escondido on April 9, 2026, operating Monday–Saturday 6AM–11PM and creating approximately 85 jobs. The location features a walk-up window, outdoor seating, and a "Moove-In Party" grand opening celebration with free entrées for guests in cow costumes.

data.status: hoping to open the new Sushi Box by the end of the month
data.short_description: Sushi Box is opening a second location in the Accenture Tower in Chicago's West Loop, next to Hudson News; the exact storefront within the building has not been announced. Owner Ari Lowenstein told What Now Chicago the team hopes to open by end of month.

Millennium Restaurant, a 32-year-old upscale vegan spot in Oakland's Rockridge neighborhood, announced it will permanently close on May 16, 2026. Co-owners Eric Tucker and Alison Bagby cited financial unsustainability and insufficient customer volume. The team plans to return with a new concept, though details are not yet available.

Bite More, a halal American-Italian fast-casual concept, opened its Duluth location on April 3, 2026, marking its entry into Gwinnett County. The opening was celebrated with a ribbon-cutting ceremony, live DJ, and food giveaways including free Oklahoma Onion Smash Burgers for the first 50 guests. The Duluth location is the brand's first in the area after its successful Buckhead debut.

The Federal, an upscale 7,300-square-foot seafood and chophouse restaurant open since 2019, permanently closed on April 2, 2026, citing rising costs and economic challenges. Managing partner Richard Brackett and co-owner David Alphonse thanked the community in a closure announcement. Its sister property, Stazione di Federal, will continue operating and honor outstanding gift cards.

data.location: 7200 Bishop Rd, Suite D-11, Plano, TX 75024
data.short_description: Maman, a New York-based French-inspired bakery and café, has filed paperwork to open a 3,102 sq ft location in Plano, TX. Construction is projected to start June 7 and wrap by December 20, 2026. If the timeline holds, the location could open before year's end.

data.location: 2003 Mt Vernon Ave (2003a Mount Vernon Avenue), Alexandria, VA 22301
data.short_description: Crooked Run Brewing has filed paperwork for a new taproom at 2003a Mount Vernon Avenue in Alexandria, VA. A liquor license application is under review with the Virginia ABC Authority. No opening timeline is currently available.

Wonder, a food hall concept partnering with celebrity chefs, plans to open its fourth Montgomery County location at Burtonsville Crossing shopping center. The new location will be situated between a Haraz Coffee House and Eggspectation. No opening timeline is currently available.

data.status: applied for a liquor license; preparing to make its regional debut
data.short_description: El Meson Espanol has applied for a liquor license with the DC Alcoholic Beverage and Cannabis Administration for a space at 1826 Columbia Road NW in Adams Morgan. The space will seat 83 with a total occupancy of 85, and hours will run Sunday–Thursday 10am–2am and Friday–Saturday 10am–3am. The concept comes from the same team behind El Rincon Espanol, which previously operated in the same space.

data.status: under construction; on deck to open at some point this summer
data.short_description: A Buffalo Wild Wings Go is being added to an existing Dunkin' location at 5150 Poplar Avenue in Memphis, operated by franchisee Kamlesh Patel. The Buffalo Wild Wings Go portion has been under construction for several months and is expected to open sometime this summer. No exact opening date has been confirmed.

The Scoop, an evolution of Kaye's Pints & Scoops led by owner Kiamesha Wilson, will open at Crosstown Concourse in the space formerly occupied by Sweet Magnolia Gelato Co. The shop will offer hand-churned small-batch ice cream, milkshakes, freshly made waffle cones, and rotating specialty items, all free of artificial flavors or dyes. Wilson has launched a crowdfunding campaign to help fund the opening.

data.status: definitive opening timeline not yet available
data.short_description: El Veracruz, a Mexican restaurant chain with 10 locations (9 in Mississippi, 1 in Tennessee), is opening a new location in Millington in a 1,200 sq ft space formerly occupied by Oriental Noodle. A commercial alteration permit was under review as of January 5, 2026, noting an occupant load of 75. No confirmed opening date is available.

data.location: 585 Cooper St (585 S. Cooper Street), Memphis, TN 38104
data.status: preparing for move; new location planned for late-to-mid summer
data.short_description: Jacques Louise Bakery, a beloved gluten-free bakery currently in Overton Square, is relocating to a larger space at 585 S. Cooper Street in Midtown Memphis. Co-owner Savannah Kenney states the current location will remain open until the new space is ready, with minimal downtime during the transition. The move is driven by outgrowing the current kitchen, particularly due to wholesale production demands.

data.status: working toward a multi-unit reemergence; looking for franchisees; no timeline or first location released
data.short_description: The Brass Tap, a Florida-based craft beer brand, is working toward a multi-unit return to the San Antonio market after exiting roughly eight years ago. The brand is currently seeking franchisees and has not yet released a timeline or specific locations. There are currently more than 50 Brass Tap locations across 12 states, including 18 in Texas.

data.location: 10000 Covington Cross Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89144 (The Courts, Summerlin)
data.short_description: The Pickle Jar, owned by Victoria Mang of Coffee & Me LLC, will open inside The Courts, a new premium indoor pickleball facility with eight courts set to open in Summerlin in May 2026. The concept will also operate out of a commissary at 1370 W Cheyenne Avenue. The eatery is described as offering easy snacks, refreshing drinks, and a social gathering space between games.

data.status: anticipated to open by this summer
data.short_description: Wingbay, a fast-casual wing restaurant chain, is opening a new location in the Windermere Village at 12020 FM 1960 W, Suite 500 in Houston, under owner Ali Nasser of Nasser Holdings. Construction is set to begin in a couple of weeks and wrap by mid-July 2026. This will be the fifth Greater Houston location for the brand.

data.location: 9837 W Tropicana Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89147
data.status: anticipated to open (no specific date given)
data.short_description: Seventy Six by Station Casinos is opening its fourth location at 9837 W Tropicana Ave in Las Vegas, at the former site of The Den LV. The neighborhood tavern concept will feature elevated comfort food, handcrafted cocktails, bartop gaming, and a classic Americana aesthetic designed by Chef Danny Wilkins. No specific opening date has been announced.

data.status: expected to open by this summer (construction May–end of August 2026)
data.short_description: Layne's Chicken, a fast-casual chicken strip brand, is opening a Leon Valley location at 7249 Bandera Rd under owner Eli Cohen. Construction is slated to start in May and wrap at the end of August 2026. The brand has sold nearly 400 franchise locations nationally and has roughly 50 under construction.

Pokeworks has signed a two-unit development deal to enter the Boulder, CO market, led by franchisees Bidosh Acharya and Amita Khanal. The first Boulder location is anticipated to open in Q4 2026, with a second to follow. The brand already has a presence in the Denver metro area via a Greenwood Village location opened in 2023.

data.status: to follow after first Boulder location
data.short_description: A second Pokeworks location in Boulder, CO is planned as part of the same two-unit development deal with franchisees Bidosh Acharya and Amita Khanal. No timeline or address has been specified for this second unit.

data.location: Address not specified (Denver metro area, CO)
data.status: actively scouting sites; timelines dependent on real estate availability
data.short_description: Denver metro franchisees Tich Nguyen and Thi Tran, who opened a Pokeworks in Greenwood Village in 2023, are actively scouting for two additional Denver-area locations. No specific addresses or timelines have been determined, as availability depends on real estate.

data.location: 124 S 6th St, Suite 150, Las Vegas, NV 89101
data.short_description: NADC Burger, a 100% Wagyu beef burger brand co-founded by professional skateboarder Neen Williams and Michelin-starred chef Phillip Frankland Lee, is opening its first permanent Las Vegas location in Downtown Las Vegas. The location will offer the brand's signature single-style Wagyu burger, twice-fried fries, a full bar, and house-made chocolate chip cookies. No specific opening date has been confirmed.

data.status: official name, menu, and opening date have not yet been announced
data.short_description: The owner of Desi Market & Grill in Natomas, Shahram Theekri, is preparing to open a new full-service sit-down restaurant next door to his existing market at 2087 Arena Blvd in the Truxel Station Shopping Center. The new space is intended for birthday parties, family gatherings, and special occasions. No official name, menu, or opening date has been announced.

The Oak Room is a restaurant planned for the ground floor of Hotel Eleanor, a 95-room adaptive reuse hotel being developed at 700 J Street in Downtown Sacramento. The restaurant will focus on locally sourced, seasonal ingredients from Sacramento's Central Valley. The $30 million renovation project is being led by developer Roger Hume of Hume Development, with design by HRGA.

non_working.reason: No qualifying business opening or closure; article covers a What Now Media Group networking event held at The Hidden Crave on March 26. No new restaurant opening or closure details are reported.

Roundup article covering 7 separate upcoming Atlanta restaurant openings. Only 3 businesses (7 Brew, Bora Bora Smoothie Cafe, Jet's Pizza) had sufficient detail extracted from the article text provided; the remaining 4 businesses mentioned in the headline (Mellow Mushroom and 3 others) were cut off due to truncated article text — insufficient details to extract rows for those entries.

non_working.identifier: None** — All 20 articles contained qualifying business opening or closure information and were fully extractable.
